entry.name: spirit-catcher
entry.domain: game (Phaser, ECS) with a React UI shell

analysis.fullMapNote: session-authored atlas (Model B) via parallel finders with per-finding adversarial verification; false positives dropped (a PhaserGame EventBus cleanup correct under eventemitter3, a correctly-scoped CoinsDisplay cleanup, two Math defensive sentinels), so the atlas is verified-real. Roadmap units src-game(4)/src-tests(2)/src-ui(1)/src-utils(1); classify deferred to HITL. Substantive findings the static gates could not reach on ECS code: ECS removeSystem no-op (system.destroy missing parens), the custom test runner exiting 0 on a missing/empty suite, an untracked nested timer, normalizeValue divide-by-zero
analysis.precisionNote: 2 high-tier static true positives (TODO, untested CRITICAL_HEALTH_THRESHOLD boundary); full MAP added 1 footgun + 2 risks + 3 silent failures, all read-verified
analysis.recallNote: no-op-paths finds 0 on ECS by design (cleanup lives in generically-named update() loops); test-adequacy on ECS comes from grade + boundary-tests
analysis.coverageDetail: 9.4% lines (713/7554), vitest v8 provider, src-scoped, 61 tests
